refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: score = imbackproject(image, model) score = imbackproject(image, model, bins)

listitem.para: Input image to score. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Reference image patch or model image used to build the histogram.
Number of intensity histogram bins. Default is 32.
Back-projection probability image with one score per input pixel.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Builds a normalized intensity histogram from the model and assigns each image pixel its corresponding histogram probability.

refsection.title: Examples
